title: The Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1981
full_text: The Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1981 वायु (प्रदूषण निवारण और नियंत्रण) अधिनियम, 1981 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198114 Act Number: 14 Enactment Date: 1981-03-29 Act Year: 1981 Short Title: The Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1981 Hindi Title: वायु (प्रदूषण निवारण और नियंत्रण) अधिनियम, 1981 Long Title: An Act to provide for the prevention, control and abatement of air pollution, for the establishment, with a view to carrying out the aforesaid purposes, of Boards, for conferring on and assigning to such Boards powers and functions relating thereto and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change Enforcement Date: 16-05-1981 Notification: 16th May, 1981, vide notification No. G.S.R. 351(E), dated 15th May, 1981, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (i). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1981 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II CENTRAL AND STATE BOARDS FOR THE PREVENTION AND CONTROL OF AIR POLLUTION CHAPTER III POWERS AND FUNCTIONS OF BOARDS CHAPTER IV PREVENTION AND CONTROL OF AIR POLLUTION CHAPTER V FUND, ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER VI PENALTIES AND PROCEDURE CHAPTER VII MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Central Pollution Control Board. Section 4. State Pollution Control Boards constituted under section 4 of Act 6 of 1974 to be State Boards under this Act. Section 5. Constitution of State Boards. Section 6. Central Board to exercise the powers and perform the functions of a State Board in the Union territories. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Terms and conditions of service of members. Section 8. Disqualifications. Section 9. Vacation of seats by members. Section 10. Meetings of Board. Section 11. Constitution of committees. Section 12. Temporary association of persons with Board for particular purpose. Section 13. Vacancy in Board not to invalidate acts or proceedings. Section 14. Member-secretary and officers and other employees of State Boards. Section 15. Delegation of powers. Section 16. Functions of Central Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 17. Functions of State Boards. Show Related Subordinates Section 18. Power to give directions. Section 19. Power to declare air pollution control areas. Show Related Subordinates Section 20. Power to give instructions for ensuring standards for emission from automobiles. Section 21. Restrictions on use of certain industrial plants. Section 21A. Power to issue guidelines. Section 22. Persons carrying on industry, etc., not to allow emission of air pollutants in excess of the standard laid down by State Board. Section 22A. Power of Board to make application to court for restraining persons from causing air pollution. Section 23. Furnishing of information to State Board and other agencies in certain cases. Section 24. Power of entry and inspection. Section 25. Power to obtain information. Section 26. Power to take samples of air or emission and procedure to be followed in connection therewith. Section 27. Reports of the result of analysis on samples taken under section 26. Section 28. State Air Laboratory. Section 29. Analysis. Section 30. Reports of analysis. Section 31. Appeals. Section 31A. Power to give directions. Show Related Subordinates Section 31B. Appeal to National Green Tribunal. Section 32. Contribution by Central Government. Section 33. Fund of Board. Section 33A. Borrowing powers of Board. Section 34. Budget. Section 35. Annual report. Section 36. Accounts and audit. Section 37. Failure to comply with the provisions of section 21 or section 22 or with the directions issued under section 31A. Section 38. Penalties for certain acts. Section 38A. Penalty for contravention by Government Department. Section 39. Penalty for contravention of certain provisions of this Act. Section 39A. Adjudicating officer Section 39B. Appeal. Section 39C. Penalty amount to be credited to Environmental Protection Fund. Section 39D. Offences for failure to comply with provisions of section 21 and for failure to pay penalty. Section 41. Offences by Government Departments. Section 42. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 43. Cognizance of offences. Section 44. Members, officers and employees of Board to be public servants. Section 45. Reports and returns. Section 46. Bar of jurisdiction. Section 47. Power of State Government to supersede State Board. Section 48. Special provision in the case of supersession of the Central Board or the State Boards constituted under the Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1974. Section 49. Dissolution of State Boards constituted under the Act. Section 50. [Omitted.]. Section 51. Maintenance of register. Section 52. Effect of other laws. Section 53. Power of Central Government to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 54. Power of State Government to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Schedule 1.
